LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT BENJAMIN CHIN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED -- NO OPPOSITION FILED. MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: Sarge R. Holtzman, Esq., 415/771-6174, on behalf of defendant BENJAMIN CHIN and moving party.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT BENJAMIN CHIN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED -- no opposition filed. No triable issue of fact re the existence of a landlord-tenant relationship. Order and judgment signed in open court. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
